focus: Baseline correctness/security review for PR 3, PR 4, PR 5, PR 2/7

title: Startup brief collapses graph probe errors into absent trust
reproduce: Mock getGraphFreshness() to return error with non-empty stats, call buildStartupBrief(), and inspect sharedPayload.provenance.trustState; startup maps error to graphState missing, then trustStateFromGraphState(missing) returns absent.
fix: Preserve an error axis for startup provenance or map the startup error branch directly to trustState unavailable instead of routing through missing.

title: Delete sweep left a task-listed promotion test file on disk
reproduce: Run find .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/promotion-positive-validation-semantics.vitest.ts -maxdepth 1 -print; the path still exists despite PR-3 deletion scope naming it.
fix: Delete this file if it belongs to the removed promotion subsystem, or update plan/tasks/close-out evidence so the delete inventory excludes this memory auto-promotion test.

title: Metrics cardinality envelope is not enforced for env-derived labels
reproduce: Run scoring or indexing repeatedly with SPECKIT_METRICS_ENABLED=true and unique SPECKIT_RUNTIME values; speckitMetrics.snapshot().metricsUniqueSeriesCount grows with every unique env value.
fix: Normalize env-derived labels to closed enums before emitting and reject unknown label values for metrics with declared label vocabularies.

title: Stale manual evidence still claims deleted promotion suite passed
reproduce: Run rg -n "promotion-gates.vitest.ts|22/22" .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill-advisor/manual_testing_playbook/SCENARIO_RUN_2026-04-21.md; the stale evidence remains.
fix: Mark the run as historical/pre-delete or scrub the deleted suite from current validation evidence.
